name: Pina Colada Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese with sugar and rum until smooth.
2. Fold in 2 cups of whipped topping, pineapple syrup, and 2 cups of coconut into the mixture.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in an 8-inch layer pan lined with plastic wrap.
4. Invert the pan onto a serving plate, removing the pan and plastic wrap.
5. Spread any remaining whipped topping over the top.
6. Sprinkle the remaining coconut on top.
7. Freeze for about 2 hours until firm.
8. Cut into wedges. Garnish with pineapple pieces and cherries if desired.
